job_title: Member of Technical Staff - Data Engineer
strengths: Strong Python and SQL hands-on experience
Built production ELT with Airflow, dbt, BigQuery
Automated data quality and CI/CD (Great Expectations, GitHub Actions)
Experience with dimensional modeling and data warehousing
Demonstrated quantified impact (efficiency and accuracy gains)
weaknesses: Limited or no explicit streaming/Kafka experience
No Azure or AWS cloud experience listed (primarily GCP)
No mention of Hadoop ecosystem or NoSQL databases
Limited years of senior-level data engineering (timeline junior to mid)
No explicit distributed systems or container orchestration at scale
